example: Please fill out these **forms** with your information.
This appears to be a misspelled word.

meaning: 得到；到达（get的第三人称单数）
example: She **gets** up at 6:30 every morning.
I am **getting** ready for the exam.
There is a **giant** panda in the zoo.
I received a birthday **gift** from my parents.
Children love to open their Christmas **gifts**.
The **girl** in the red dress is my sister.
The **girls** in our class are very friendly.
Please complete the task at the **given** time.

meaning: 给；给予（give的第三人称单数）
example: My teacher **gives** us lots of homework.
Thank you for **giving** me so much help.
I am **glad** to meet you here.
Please give me a **glass** of water.
My father wears **glasses** to read books.
Set clear **goals** for your English learning.
She **goes** to school by bus every day.
I am **going** to the library now.
